name: Secure AI Framework
description: Google's Secure AI Framework — conceptual framework for securing AI systems by extending existing security best practices to AI-specific threats. Defines six core elements: expand strong security foundations, automate defenses, harmonize controls, adapt controls, contextualize AI risks, and apply AI to security.
relationToCloudSecurity: Cloud-AI security guidance applicable across cloud platforms.
relationToAISecurity: Direct AI-security framework; companion to SAIF Risk Map and SAIF Risk Assessment.
